summary: The diff implements all four requirements substantially. REQ-20 (neon blue theme + dark background), REQ-21 (7-card grid with smooth-scroll), REQ-22 (Music section), REQ-23 (Live TV section), and REQ-24 (Navigation with 7 links) are all present. One minor gap exists: the Navigation order specified in REQ-24 is 'Games, Proxy, Movies & TV, Music, Apps, Hacks, Live TV' but the implemented order is 'Games, Movies & TV, Proxy, Music, Apps, Hacks, Live TV' (Proxy and Movies & TV are swapped).

missing_requirements.requirement: Navigation bar shows links to all 7 sections in this order: Games, Proxy, Movies & TV, Music, Apps, Hacks, Live TV
missing_requirements.reason: The navLinks array in Navigation.tsx places Movies & TV second and Proxy third, reversing the specified order where Proxy should be second and Movies & TV third.
